creator: portmaster@bsdforge.com
text:
(In reply to Thomas Zander from comment #2)
> Why do we need the license file checked in via FILESDIR?
> The wxwidgets tarball contains the preamble in docs/
> Also from the preamble it seems
> LICENSE= wxWidgets
> may be incomplete since the preamble clearly states some parts are under
> GPLv2. I'd expect LICENSE_COMB to reflect this.

The information I based this LICENSE addition was from
wxwidgets, themselves:

http://wxwidgets.org/about/licence/

"wxWidgets is currently licenced under the "wxWindows Library Licence" pending approval of the "wxWidgets Library Licence" which will be identical apart from the name."

"The wxWindows Library Licence has been approved by the Open Source Initiative."

"In August 2005, an ambiguity in Clause 2 was removed (replaced "the user's" with "your") and the version bumped to 3.1."

Is their page incorrect?

Thank you for all your time, and consideration, Thomas Zander.

--Chris
